wikitext:
[]: 3.0 Pictures Thread [images go in spoilers] Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:12 pm All images go in spoiler tags. DO NOT HOT LINK. (See Guidelines.) Please provide attribution to the artists whenever possible.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:33 pm We could directly go with the "all pics in spoiler" policy to avoid repetitions of past incidents, at least I'll personally follow that policy anyway. I'm starting with him obviously, the one who keeps dying for our sins, the Space Jesus of the new century, Kaworu-kun: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Jayfive » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:48 pm Holy moly, dem Japanese be working fast.

[]: Post by KingXanaduu » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:50 pm This is freaking amazing, in less than, what, 24 hours? Someone call these people and FREAKING HIRE THEM!!

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:57 pm ^ I'm seeing tons of pics, especially Kaworu and KxS ones, on 4chan there's also stuff which I can't find on pixiv, probably it comes from artists' web-pages. Sakura pic: SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Fuuforufu » Sat Nov 17, 2012 7:58 pm amazing fan arts!!! Thanks for sharing I hope there will be some fan arts about the "code 777" i really wanna see the EVA-02 with a tail xD

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Nov 17, 2012 8:01 pm Keep it coming Shinchan!! Asuka pic because I had to. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 8:19 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Keep it coming Shinchan!!

[]: Post by Jayfive » Sat Nov 17, 2012 8:26 pm Man alive, he really has become Bishonen Space Jesus hasn't he? I thought his fan base level was mad when he only had 10-15 minutes of screen time, now its very obviously over 9000.

[]: Post by Fuuforufu » Sat Nov 17, 2012 8:41 pm this one is from tumblr EVA13 SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by EvangelionFan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 8:43 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Asuka pic because I had to.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 8:47 pm Fuuforufu wrote: this one is from tumblr

[]: Post by Jayfive » Sat Nov 17, 2012 8:51 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Yeah, this film will bring the fanbase to the next level, if I rationally think about it even his martyrdom serves the purpose of turning him once again in the very embodiment of selfless love...

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:14 pm ^ My bad, thanks for the correction. Another pair of KxS pics, they're actually just two different versions of the same pic; Source : SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Fuuforufu » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:31 pm Kaworu wearing the new plugsuit Source SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Kaname Langley » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:32 pm Somebody try to explain the movie or something. Pivix SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Fuuforufu » Sat Nov 17, 2012 10:20 pm Asuka Source SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Chuckman » Sat Nov 17, 2012 11:18 pm I'm glad that Sakura picture is tame. For some reason, the idea of someone drawing Toji's little sister in a typical Asuka or Rei pose freaks me the hell out.

[]: Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Nov 17, 2012 11:22 pm I agree 100%

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sat Nov 17, 2012 11:41 pm Somehow, these do not bring me the joy they used to.
